title: MCSM Client Modpack
description: A client-side modpack that recreates the visual style of Minecraft: Story Mode.
body:
A client-side modpack that recreates the visual style of Minecraft: Story Mode, focused on modifying the visual experience, the interface, and the game’s immersion, without adding any content that affects the server.

The modpack includes graphical changes such as visual effects, smoother animations, and particle adjustments, giving the game a look similar to the Story Mode style.

Credits to DogeTOM11431, DerpDerpling, and MinecraftEinstein for creating the original resource pack “MCSM Official Pack,” which I modified to make it even more accurate to the original game. Additional credits to the Vanilla Tweaks website, which I used to add extra visual improvements to the game.

Feel free to customize the modpack by adding or removing mods or resource packs. However, if you repost it, please make sure to give proper credit. Now, just sit back and enjoy your Story Mode experience!

**Vanilla Tweaks:** https://vanillatweaks.net/

Correct order for placing the resource packs below.

![Correct order for placing the resource packs below.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c438081282450846afa7b6d5249b958f095a2d4e.png)
